candidate_problem_record.subject: physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A block of mass $M$ is rigidly connected to a massless circular track of radius $a$ on a frictionless horizontal table as shown in Fig. 2.7. A particle of mass $m$ is confined to move without friction on the circular track which is vertical. Set up the Lagrangian, using $\theta$ as one coordinate.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。
